lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਸੰਗਿ ਖੇਲਹਿ ਵਰ ਕਾਮਨਿ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਖੋਜਤ ਮਨ ਮਨੇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: har prabh sang kheleh var kaaman guramukh khojat man mane |1| rahaau |
lines.english: The sublime soul-brides play with their Lord God. The Gurmukhs look within themselves; their minds are filled with faith. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਿਲੁ ਸਖੀ ਸਹੇਲੀ ਹਰਿ ਗੁਨ ਬਨੇ ॥
lines.translit: mil sakhee sahelee har gun bane |
lines.english: Joining together with my friends and companions, I am adorned with the Lord's Glorious Virtues.
The Guru has shown me that my Sovereign Lord God is with me. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਓਹੁ ਘਟਿ ਘਟਿ ਰਾਵੈ ਸਰਬ ਪ੍ਰੇਉ ॥
lines.translit: ohu ghatt ghatt raavai sarab preo |
lines.english: The Beloved Lord of all celebrates in each and every heart.
The self-willed manmukhs, suffering in separation, do not understand this mystery.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਗੁਰ ਭਗਤਿ ਨ ਭਾਉ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: bin gur bhagat na bhaau hoe |
lines.english: Without the Guru, devotional love does not well up within.
The Guru has implanted the Naam within me; I chant it, and meditate on it. ||2||
The Gurmukh is stable, knowing that God is always with him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨੁ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਨਿਰਮਲੁ ਮਲੁ ਸਬਦਿ ਖੋਇ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: man guramukh niramal mal sabad khoe |3|
lines.english: That mortal who becomes Gurmukh becomes immaculate; the Word of the Shabad washes away his filth. ||3||
Without the Guru, the blind cry out, entangled in worldly affairs.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਗੁਰ ਸੰਤ ਨ ਸੰਗੁ ਦੇਇ ॥
lines.translit: bin gur sant na sang dee |
lines.english: Without the Guru, one is not blessed with the Society of the Saints.
Day and night, he savors the Yoga of devotional worship.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਸੰਤ ਸਭਾ ਦੁਖੁ ਮਿਟੈ ਰੋਗੁ ॥
lines.translit: gur sant sabhaa dukh mittai rog |
lines.english: Associating with the Saint Guru, suffering and sickness are ended.
Uniting with the Guru, the mortal conquers and subdues his mind.
The King of kings Himself adminsters true justice.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨ ਨਾਨਕ ਹਰਿ ਵਰੁ ਸਹਜ ਜੋਗੁ ॥੪॥੬॥
lines.translit: jan naanak har var sehaj jog |4|6|
lines.english: Servant Nanak merges with his Husband Lord, in the Yoga of intuitive ease. ||4||6||
By His Creative Power, God fashioned the creation.
Basant, First Mehl:
The most sublime Word of the Guru's Teachings is always with us.
The wealth of the Lord's Name, the source of nectar, is easily acquired. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਤ ਬਿਸਰਸਿ ਰੇ ਮਨ ਰਾਮ ਬੋਲਿ ॥
lines.translit: mat bisaras re man raam bol |
lines.english: So chant the Name of the Lord; do not forget it, O my mind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਪਰੰਪਰੁ ਅਗਮ ਅਗੋਚਰੁ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਹਰਿ ਆਪਿ ਤੁਲਾਏ ਅਤੁਲੁ ਤੋਲਿ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: aparanpar agam agochar guramukh har aap tulaae atul tol |1| rahaau |
lines.english: The Lord is Infinite, Inaccessible and Incomprehensible; His weight cannot be weighed, but He Himself allows the Gurmukh to weigh Him. ||1||Pause||
The slanderous and greedy people are hard-hearted.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਸੇਵ ਤਰੇ ਤਜਿ ਮੇਰ ਤੋਰ ॥
lines.translit: gur sev tare taj mer tor |
lines.english: Serving the Guru, they are carried across; they have abandoned any distinction between 'mine' and 'yours'.
Your GurSikhs serve at the Guru's Feet.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਿ ਤੁਠੈ ਪਾਈਐ ਹਰਿ ਮਹਲਿ ਠਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: gur tutthai paaeeai har mehal tthaau |
lines.english: When the Guru is pleased, the mortal obtains a place in the Mansion of the Lord's Presence.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਸੇਵ ਨ ਭਾਈ ਸਿ ਚੋਰ ਚੋਰ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: gur sev na bhaaee si chor chor |2|
lines.english: Those who do not love to serve the Guru are the most thieving of thieves. ||2||
When the Guru is pleased, He blesses the mortals with loving devotional worship of the Lord.
The Guru unites in union with the Lord, and grants the gift of the Name.
So renounce slander, and awaken in devotional worship of the Lord.
Devotion to the Lord is wonderful; it comes through good karma and destiny. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਫਲੁ ਨਾਮੁ ਪਰਾਪਤਿ ਗੁਰੁ ਤੁਸਿ ਦੇਇ ॥
lines.translit: fal naam paraapat gur tus dee |
lines.english: They obtain the fruit of the Naam, when the Guru's favor is bestowed.
The Guru loves His Sikhs, day and night.
Says Nanak, those who receive it are very rare indeed. ||4||7||
Basant, Third Mehl, Ek-Thukay:
When it pleases our Lord and Master, His servant serves Him.
He remains dead while yet alive, and redeems all his ancestors. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਚੁ ਨਾਮੁ ਮੇਰੈ ਹਿਰਦੈ ਵਸੈ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: saach naam merai hiradai vasai |1| rahaau |
lines.english: The True Name abides within my heart. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੇਰੀ ਭਗਤਿ ਨ ਛੋਡਉ ਕਿਆ ਕੋ ਹਸੈ ॥
lines.translit: teree bhagat na chhoddau kiaa ko hasai |
lines.english: I shall not renounce Your devotional worship, O Lord; what does it matter if people laugh at me?

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੈਸੇ ਸੰਤ ਜਨ ਰਾਮ ਨਾਮ ਰਵਤ ਰਹੈ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: taise sant jan raam naam ravat rahai |2|
lines.english: so does the Lord's humble Saint remain absorbed in the Lord's Name. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੈ ਮੂਰਖ ਮੁਗਧ ਊਪਰਿ ਕਰਹੁ ਦਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: mai moorakh mugadh aoopar karahu deaa |
lines.english: I am foolish and ignorant, O Lord; please be merciful to me.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੈਸੇ ਮਾਇਆ ਮੋਹਿ ਪ੍ਰਾਣੀ ਗਲਤੁ ਰਹੈ ॥
lines.translit: jaise maaeaa mohi praanee galat rahai |
lines.english: Just as the mortal remains engrossed in attachment to Maya,

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਹਤੁ ਨਾਨਕੁ ਸੰਸਾਰ ਕੇ ਨਿਹਫਲ ਕਾਮਾ ॥
lines.translit: kehat naanak sansaar ke nihafal kaamaa |
lines.english: Says Nanak, worldly affairs are fruitless.
May I remain in Your Sanctuary. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ਕੋ ਪਾਵੈ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤ ਨਾਮਾ ॥੪॥੮॥
lines.translit: gur prasaad ko paavai amrit naamaa |4|8|
lines.english: Only by Guru's Grace does one receive the Nectar of the Naam, the Name of the Lord. ||4||8||
First Mehl, Basant Hindol, Second House:
One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਲ ਗ੍ਰਾਮ ਬਿਪ ਪੂਜਿ ਮਨਾਵਹੁ ਸੁਕ੍ਰਿਤੁ ਤੁਲਸੀ ਮਾਲਾ ॥
lines.translit: saal graam bip pooj manaavahu sukrit tulasee maalaa |
lines.english: O Brahmin, you worship and believe in your stone-god, and wear your ceremonial rosary beads.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਮ ਨਾਮੁ ਜਪਿ ਬੇੜਾ ਬਾਂਧਹੁ ਦਇਆ ਕਰਹੁ ਦਇਆਲਾ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: raam naam jap berraa baandhahu deaa karahu deaalaa |1|
lines.english: Chant the Name of the Lord. Build your boat, and pray, "O Merciful Lord, please be merciful to me." ||1||
